description: Unlayered Bypass - Preventing imports to files outside declared layers

expectedViolations.note: utils importing from lib violates flow (only lib -> utils allowed)

expectedViolations.suggestion: Either add 'src/misc/' as a layer or move helpers.ts to a declared layer.

notes: With unlayeredImports: 'error', imports from layered -> unlayered are violations
With unlayeredImports: 'warn', violations are logged but build passes
With unlayeredImports: 'ignore' (default), no violations are reported
Unlayered files importing layered files is always allowed (unlayered not subject to rules)
